runners.formComment: Won two starts back over 425m at Bendigo. Last start he finished 4th in a Special conditions race on April 5 over 425m at Bendigo behind Strop beaten 5.5 lengths (24.17). Draw likely to suit. Has ability and worth including.

runners.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last over 460m at this track beaten 15 lengths (26.82) behind Little Flower in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 7. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.
